title: Roast Vegetable Brunch
description: A hearty brunch recipe featuring slovakian vegetables roasted to perfection.

ingredients.name: 2 medium slovakian vegetables (such as bell peppers or eggplants)

instructions: In a large bowl, toss together the slovakian vegetables, olive oil, onion, garlic, thyme, salt, and pepper until the vegetables are evenly coated.
Transfer the vegetables to a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: serve with crusty bread or over eggs for a filling brunch.
